summary: Base W11 (~20 mpw, §4.C) — Mon shape changed: athlete elected a 6-mi continuous T progression instead of the §4.C Mon easy + hill strides (8:13/mi avg, 4 mi continuous at the 7:50–7:55 nudge, RPE RIR 2-3, 5th straight T quick of the nudge, Adj #125). That paid W11's one Base quality day (§4.C), so Wed's 5×6 @ T drops and Wed becomes Z1 easy 30–35 min + 6–8 hill strides — recovers the displaced Mon NM dose 48h post-T. Tue Hyp A / Thu off / Fri easy + strides / Sat 65 min long + Hyp B all unchanged. Net mileage still ~20 mpw inside the v4.3 28-mpw cap (Adj #67). Lift carry-forwards into this week: incline 145 hold, +5→150 only on a cleaner set-3 RIR (Adj #107); rear-delt 130 bump landed, hold (Adj #112); DB lat 30 hold both slots — Sat is bump-eligible if Adj #117's within-band spread repeats. Open bump gates: Tue preacher 65 cleared at 4×10 (Adj #109) but Sat-slot 65 still failed at 4×12 (Adj #118); Tue pushdown 22.5 re-attempt continues, pain-gated, §10.A 4-wk clock still reset (Adj #110/#119); Sat lat pulldown 160 hold-until-clean (Adj #115); Sat chest-supp row 75 rebuilding headroom (Adj #116); Sat seated calf 345 re-attempt gated on a clean-AM read on the lift day itself (Adj #120/#124). Tendons: L Achilles reactive — after-only mild dull soreness now repeated W10 Wed → W11 Mon on Zoom Fly 6 T-runs (below the Adj #34 trigger but recurring); recheck AM Tue + Wed. Right patellar watch (Adj #64). T pace nudge stays 7:50–7:55/mi (Adj #77/#93/#125); formal recalibration defers to next week's W12 5K-TT (§10). Always-ask at logging: fed/fasted + AM Achilles/knee/SI (Adj #123).

days.session: Off-protocol long T-progression 6.0 mi (replaces Mon easy + Wed T)
days.note: Done — 8:13/mi avg, splits 8:54/8:16/8:02/8:07/7:59/7:55; 4 mi continuous at T (Adj #77/#93 nudge); HR avg 170; cadence 173→175 spm; RPE RIR 2-3; fed; road, Zoom Fly 6. Mild post-run L Achilles, below Adj #34 trigger (Adj #125).

Incline 145 hold (+5→150 only on cleaner set-3, Adj #107); DB lat 30 hold 6 sets (Adj #108); preacher 65 re-attempt at Tue 4×10 (Adj #109); pushdown 22.5 re-attempt, pain-gated (Adj #110/#119); rear-delt 130 hold (Adj #112); decline crunch BW hold (Adj #111/#122). AM Achilles read needed at logging (gating reactive-tendon trajectory, Adj #125).

days.session: RESHAPED — Z1 easy 30–35 min + 6–8 hill strides @ 4–6%
days.note: Wed T dropped — paid by Mon's continuous T progression (Adj #125). This slot now recovers the displaced Mon NM dose 48h post-T. Easy pace 9:45–10:45/mi, HR ≤155 (off-191 cap, anchor by pace), cadence 165–172 spm easy / 175–182 spm strides. Hold the ≤180 stride cadence cap (Adj #25/#62). Treadmill or road; watch L Achilles AM read pre-session.
Permanent off (Adj #92) — mobility / walk + daily SI prehab.
Base W11 Fri = easy + strides (§4.C); VO2max doesn't start until W13. Flat strides per §2.A — hill strides Mon-only (and this week Wed-only per the reshape).

days.session: Long Z1 65 min + Hyp B (PM, ≥6h gap)
days.note: Lift: lat pulldown 160 hold-until-clean (Adj #115); chest-supp row 75 (Adj #116); DB lat Sat 30 bump-eligible if Adj #117 spread repeats; preacher hold 60 (next 65 needs RIR 1-2 set 1, Adj #118); pushdown 22.5 continues (Adj #119); seated calf 345 re-attempt gated on clean AM lift-day report (Adj #120); chest fly 130 (Adj #121); decline crunch BW.
Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1 pyramid, daily SI prehab. Walking fine.
